name: Splunk Asset Risk Intelligence MCP Tools
description: Read-only MCP tools for Splunk Asset and Risk Intelligence readiness validation.
author: splunk-asset-risk-intelligence-setup skill

tools.name: ari_app_health
tools.title: ARI App Health
tools.description: Check ARI app installation, visibility, configured state, and version.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=SplunkAssetRiskIntelligence OR title=Splunk_TA_ARI OR title=TA-ari* | table title label version disabled visible configured state | sort title

tools.name: ari_required_indexes
tools.title: ARI Required Indexes
tools.description: Check required ARI indexes and basic storage/event counters.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/indexes count=0 | search title=ari_staging OR title=ari_asset OR title=ari_internal OR title=ari_ta | table title disabled datatype totalEventCount currentDBSizeMB maxTotalDataSizeMB splunk_server | sort title

tools.name: ari_kvstore_status
tools.title: ARI KV Store Readiness
tools.description: Show platform KV Store status and ARI-owned collection definitions.
tools.spl: | rest /services/server/info | eval check="platform_status", collection="", app="", accelerated_fields="", replicate="", kv_status=kvStoreStatus, kv_version=kvStoreVersion | table check serverName kv_status kv_version collection app accelerated_fields replicate | append [| rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/storage/collections/config count=0 | search eai:acl.app=SplunkAssetRiskIntelligence OR title=ari* | eval check="collection", serverName="", kv_status="", kv_version="", collection=title, app='eai:acl.app' | table check serverName kv_status kv_version collection app accelerated_fields replicate] | sort check app collection

tools.name: ari_roles_capabilities
tools.title: ARI Roles And Capabilities
tools.description: Inventory roles and capabilities that appear to be ARI-related.
tools.spl: | rest /services/authorization/roles count=0 | search title=ari* OR imported_roles=ari* OR capabilities=ari* | table title imported_roles capabilities srchIndexesAllowed srchIndexesDefault | sort title

tools.name: ari_saved_searches
tools.title: ARI Saved Search Inventory
tools.description: List ARI-owned saved searches and scheduling state.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/-/saved/searches count=0 | search eai:acl.app=SplunkAssetRiskIntelligence OR title=ari* | table title eai:acl.app disabled is_scheduled cron_schedule next_scheduled_time | sort title

tools.name: ari_ari_ta_data
tools.title: ARI TA Data Visibility
tools.description: Summarize recent ARI technical add-on data.
tools.spl: | tstats count latest(_time) as latest where index=ari_ta by index sourcetype host | eval latest=strftime(latest,"%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ") | sort -count

tools.name: ari_exposure_analytics_readiness
tools.title: ARI ES Exposure Analytics Readiness
tools.description: Check ES and ARI app presence needed for Exposure Analytics handoff readiness.
tools.spl: | rest /services/apps/local count=0 | search title=SplunkAssetRiskIntelligence OR title=SplunkEnterpriseSecuritySuite OR title=MissionControl | table title version disabled visible configured | sort title
